projectDescription: A Progressive Web App (PWA) that processes Excel files with street listings and automatically assigns each street to its corresponding zone in Bilbao.
keyFeatures: Excel file processing (.xlsx / .xls) with automatic zone assignment
Street-to-zone dictionary with ~500 entries covering all Bilbao neighborhoods
Coverage statistics: total streets, identified, missing, and percentage
Unidentified streets list with one-click add-to-dictionary flow
Paginated preview table with search and filter controls
Custom street entries saved in localStorage (persist across sessions)
Export results as Excel and unmatched streets as .txt
Full dictionary viewer with search and zone filters
Offline-capable PWA with Service Worker cache-first strategy
Installable on mobile and desktop as a standalone app
publicApiSurface: asignarZona(calle) — returns zone string for a given street name
getDictionary() — merges base dictionary (zonasEstandar) with custom localStorage entries
zonasEstandar — base street-to-zone mapping object (~500 entries in js/data.js)
customStreets — user-defined overrides stored under localStorage key 'zonasCustom_v1'
renderResults(data) — renders stats bar, zone breakdown, unmatched list, and preview table
renderDictionary() — populates the full dictionary viewer with search/filter
renderDictStats() — renders per-zone entry counts in the Consult tab
CACHE version constant in sw.js — controls Service Worker cache invalidation on deploy
